description: Enhance media sourcing with Unsplash API, Freesound API for background audio/SFX, better keyword extraction via AI, media quality filtering, caching, fallback chain (video > image > text-on-background), and media preview/selection UI
steps: Step 1: Add new API keys to backend/app/config.py - Add unsplash_access_key (str, default '') and freesound_api_key (str, default '') to the Settings class. Update .env.example with UNSPLASH_ACCESS_KEY and FREESOUND_API_KEY entries.

Step 2: Add Unsplash search to backend/app/services/media_sourcer.py - Implement search_unsplash(query, client, per_page=3) function using Unsplash API (https://api.unsplash.com/search/photos). Prefer 'regular' size URL (1080px wide). Return list[MediaItem] with media_type=image, source='unsplash'.

Step 3: Add Freesound search to backend/app/services/media_sourcer.py - Implement search_freesound(query, client, limit=3) function using Freesound API v2 (https://freesound.org/apiv2/search/text/). Return results as a new model (or extend MediaItem with a 'sound' media_type). This provides background music/SFX options.

Step 4: Improve keyword extraction in backend/app/services/media_sourcer.py - Replace the simple stop-word-based _extract_keywords function with ai_extract_keywords(visual_description) that uses the AI gateway (app/services/ai_gateway.py) to extract 3-5 optimal search keywords from the visual description. Keep the old function as a fast fallback when AI gateway is unavailable.

Step 5: Add media quality filtering in backend/app/services/media_sourcer.py - Add a filter_by_quality(items, min_width=1280, min_height=720) function that filters media items by minimum resolution. Apply this filter after collecting results from all sources, before selecting the best item. Allow items without dimension info to pass through.

Step 6: Add media caching in backend/app/services/media_sourcer.py - Implement a simple file-system cache: before downloading, check if the same URL has already been downloaded (use a JSON manifest file in the cache dir). If cached, reuse the local path. Cache dir: {output_dir}/media_cache/. Add a cache_enabled flag to settings (default True).

Step 7: Implement fallback chain in source_media_for_scene - Restructure the media sourcing order: (1) Try video sources (Pexels videos, Pixabay videos), (2) Try image sources (Unsplash, Pexels photos, Pixabay images), (3) Try GIFs (Giphy), (4) Final fallback: generate a text-on-background image using PIL (white text of the visual_description on a gradient background). Save the generated image and return it as a MediaItem.

Step 8: Add a new endpoint POST /api/videos/search-media in backend/app/routers/videos.py - Accepts a query string and returns multiple media options (up to 9) from all sources so the user can pick. This powers the preview/selection UI. Response model: list of MediaItem.
Step 9: Update frontend/src/types/index.ts - Add 'sound' to MediaItem media_type union. Add search-media related types.
Step 10: Update frontend/src/api/client.ts - Add searchMedia(query: string): Promise<MediaItem[]> function.

Step 11: Enhance frontend/src/components/MediaPreview.tsx - Add a 'Search More' button per scene that opens a modal/dropdown with a search input. When the user searches, call the search-media API and display a grid of thumbnail results. Allow the user to click to select a different media item for that scene. Show media quality badges (HD, 4K) based on width/height.
Step 12: Update backend/tests/test_schemas.py - Add tests for new models and validate the search-media endpoint request/response. Add a test for the text-on-background fallback generation.
Step 13: Add MediaType.sound to backend/app/models/schemas.py MediaType enum for Freesound results.
acceptance_criteria: Unsplash API search function returns valid MediaItem results
Freesound API search function returns sound results
AI-powered keyword extraction produces better search terms than the stopword approach
Media quality filter correctly removes low-resolution items
Cache prevents re-downloading the same URL
Text-on-background fallback generates a valid image when no API results are found
Search-media endpoint returns up to 9 results from multiple sources
Frontend MediaPreview component allows searching and selecting alternative media per scene
All existing backend tests continue to pass
verification: Run 'cd /projects/sandbox/abetVideos/backend && python -m pytest tests/ -v' and confirm all tests pass
Run 'cd /projects/sandbox/abetVideos/frontend && npm run build' and confirm no TypeScript compilation errors
findings: All 75 backend tests pass. Frontend builds cleanly with TypeScript. The monkeypatch for the search-media endpoint test needed to target app.routers.videos module (not app.services.media_sourcer) because the router uses a direct import. Pillow was already in pyproject.toml dependencies. The lucide-react library already had Music and Volume2 icons available.
